rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GAVIN LUM SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TRANSFER to SACRAMENTO County
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/18/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Trusts require 30 days' notice. Notice mailed 8/12/24 was not at least 30 days before this hearing. (2) When did the bank relocate to Sacramento? It has multiple branches, including in San Francisco. Please provide a courtesy copy of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 11/8/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELMO LEE CARTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/18/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No proof of service has been filed. (3) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (4) The petition does disclose any information as to any of the facts of the case or why the estate has no assets. (5) The receipt signed by Elvin B. Carter (without any representative capacity) was for $34,232.64. The bank statement shows that a cashier's check was issued on 5/16/24 in the amount of $34,233.35.. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 11/8/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS IVELI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Executor's amended accounting is continued to 10/28/24. Executor neither requested a continuance date for the hearing of his proposed amended accounting nor obtained an agreement from the other parties to request a continuance from the Court for a proposed amended accounting. Filing an amended accoutning on 8/29/24 for a hearing on 9/11/24 is clearly insufficient for notice. No proof of service has been filed, and any notice of the amended accounting for this hearing would be defective in any event. Courtesy copies of the amended accounting and all supporting papers must be received by the assigned examiner by 10/18/24.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS IVELI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/28/24. The first accounting must be adjudicated before a second one can be filed. No notice was given to the executor. Did he direct in writing that notice be given only to his attorneys? No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHARLES BOBB
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/14/24. Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Rodrick Bobb Sr., died on 1/25/24. The mandatory JC form DE-300 is required for the 13100 affidavit. (2) The "supplemental declaration" AMENDED the petition, at least as to the distribuiton to James Robert Bobb, Jr., and costs to be reimbursed to the attorney and to the administrator. (3) Will these "clarifying" changes not change the net distribution, or is the administrator proposing to add the additional amounts to the reserve, which would also be an amendment to her petition? (4) The only correct form of notice (required for any amending pleading) is the mandatory JC form Notice of Hearing. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 10/4/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SUN WAH MOON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing with $170,000 bond required, although the proposed fiduciary only verified his attorney's declaration, when a fiduciary or a proposed fiduciary is required to make, sign, and verify his own pleadings. Status of closing the estate will be set for 9/22/25. The administrator must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before that status date. Appearance will be required on 9/22/25 if no petition has been filed. (The 13100 affidavits attached to the attorney's declaration were also incomplete and not appropriate.)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: SUNNY NG MITCHELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION Petition For Order Enforcing Power Of Attorney And For Fees Against Chase Bank For Refusal To Honor Power Of Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/09/2024. The following issues must be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) No DE-120 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) No proof of service on Chase and Tweedy Browne is on file. Each respondent must be served in the manner required by Probate Code section 4544(b) and CCP sections 413.10 et seq. applicable to a civil summons. 4) The principal's current address must be provided by a verified allegation. 5) Has the petitioner furnished an affidavit under section 4305 to either respondent? If so, please file a copy. 6) Did the principal own the Chase or Tweedy Browne account when the principal's trust was created in December 1999? If so, did the trust instrument (including its schedule, attachment, or exhibit) or general assignment of property (if any) confirm either account as an asset of the trust?
